title: Trustworthy configuration and scalable core foundation
acceptance: Plugin upgrades cannot silently change effective policy; config status and dry-run migration explain every material difference.
Baseline source collection includes implementation files independently from KB search extensions.
A path-safe command-scoped canonical store and deterministic enterprise benchmark harness are available without changing existing public output.
